ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job title */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the employee belongs to */,
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salary record of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the employee */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the employee's job */,
  "work_anniversary" TEXT /* Date of the employee's work anniversary */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the employee's next performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_salary_id FOREIGN KEY ("salary_id") REFERENCES salaries ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the team */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the team belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team's purpose and responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget for the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department's purpose and responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee the salary belongs to */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the salary */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the salary became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the salary ended (if applicable) */,
  "salary_type" TEXT /* Type of salary (e.g., hourly, annual) */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Details of benefits (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the employee (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals set for the employee */,
  "areas_for_improvement" TEXT /* Areas for improvement identified during the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_information" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee the contact information belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_information_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee the user account belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_records" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who attended the training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training */,
  "training_description" TEXT /* Description of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee the goal belongs to */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the goal */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who is eligible for the benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "benefit_description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
